text: REST endpoints conventionally use plural nouns; some style guides (Microsoft REST Guidelines) explicitly require it.
GraphQL eliminates over-fetching by letting clients request exact field sets — measurable 30-60% payload reduction in mobile-heavy products.
Cursor pagination is correct for sorted feeds, but offset pagination is acceptable when total count must be exposed for UI page selectors.
Versioning via URL path vs header — which has lower client-migration cost?
